microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 delivery** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and freed engineers to focus on high-value technical problem-solving.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a **rack-level drill program** in 4 months at a 94% recovery rate — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation model across the platform.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract spanning Government and Enterprise customer segments.

Removed cross-functional roadblocks across engineering and product teams by owning risk tracking and dependency mapping for complex, multi-team programs, ensuring **on-time, high-quality delivery** across all program milestones.

Accelerated planning workflows through an internal **AI agent**, restructuring drill scheduling to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase program capacity by 21% — directly empowering engineers to stay focused on technical execution.

Optimized cross-team integration workflows by implementing scalable process frameworks across security, engineering, and product teams, reducing friction and driving alignment on mission-critical initiatives for Government and Enterprise customers.
microsoft_2023: Drove **cross-functional adoption** of AI-powered code generation workflows, running user demos and training sessions across 14 engineering teams — saving 37 hours of monthly engineering effort and reducing operational friction for developers.

Shaped the product roadmap by facilitating **11+ structured user interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical feature gaps and securing stakeholder buy-in to prioritize intent-based YAML generation as a core platform capability.

Streamlined information retrieval by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** platform with rigorous metadata standards, cutting engineer lookup time by 83% and improving cross-team workflow efficiency at scale.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, securing buy-in across 140+ teams and removing execution bottlenecks.

Identified **81 hours of manual toil per region** by leading discovery sessions with 20+ service teams, then built a phased roadmap to automate critical launch paths — directly reducing friction and enabling faster technology integration.

Empowered leadership to prioritize high-impact automation investments by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, bringing visibility to inefficiencies and enabling data-driven program decisions.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by owning the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and proactively resolving integration risks before they impacted delivery.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, triaging and resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and keep cross-functional engineering execution on track.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing recurring friction in the cross-team release workflow.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end operations and managing the full scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through a redesigned CRM process that reduced workflow friction across the sales team.

Cut **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile to better align messaging with target customer needs.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and delivering actionable recommendations that directly informed business strategy.

tailoring_notes: 'Empowering engineers to focus on high-value technical problems' (JD phrase) woven into microsoft_ft bullet#2 and amazon_robotics bullet#2 to mirror Cape's stated TPM philosophy.
'On-time, high-quality delivery' (JD impact statement) embedded verbatim in microsoft_ft bullet#5 to signal direct alignment with Cape's program execution expectations.
'Government and Enterprise customers' (JD customer segments) surfaced in microsoft_ft bullets #4 and #7 to show Cyrus has direct experience serving the exact customer base Cape names.

'Reducing friction / streamlined workflows' (JD process language) used across microsoft_2022 bullet#2, amazon_robotics bullet#3, and pro_painters bullet#1 to consistently echo Cape's process-optimization priority.
'Cross-functional alignment and buy-in' (JD cross-functional influence requirement) explicitly named in microsoft_2022 bullet#1 and microsoft_ft bullet#5 to match Cape's competency language.
